CIP-0: Professionals take their first structured step into innovation, learning its core tools and mindset
CIP-1: Professionals learn to generate and apply breakthrough ideas, the only innovation management course accredited as 17024
CIP-2: Candidates prove mastery by applying Level 1 tools to a real growth challenge in their organisation
CIP-MC: A live cohort fast-tracks working professionals to CIP certification, the only innovation management course accredited as 17024
CCIO-1: Leaders learn to manage innovation end-to-end across the organisation
CCIO-2: Leaders build the capability to design and run an enterprise-wide innovation ecosystem
CCIO-MC: Senior leaders earn the premier executive designation for driving organisational innovation
CGIS-1: High-school students learn to think more innovatively and solve problems with empathy
CGIT: Teachers gain the tools to instil an innovation mindset in their students
CGT: Experienced innovators become certified to train and develop others
IP: Anyone can shift from passively watching change to proactively driving value
PBCC: Practitioners master a repeatable five-step method to turn problems into breakthrough ideas
CDT-1: Professionals build human-centred design skills through the Immerse, Invent, Implement method
CDT-2: Practitioners apply Design Thinking methods to a real organisational challenge
CDTT-3: Certified designers earn the credentials to train others in human-centred design
CAAP: Practitioners learn to operationalise AI by building a working agent through Innovation 5.0
CGA: Professionals gain the skills to audit innovation management systems against ISO 56001
CIME: Experts learn to establish and improve innovation management systems across the ISO 56000 family
CTC: Leaders learn to turn 130+ breakthrough technologies into future-ready strategies
CLC: Leaders prepare to drive the shift from an aging society to a longevity society
CFF-1: Professionals sharpen the analytical skills to question assumptions and read weak signals
CFF-2: Leaders master the S4 Futures framework for rigorous, structured scenario work
CFF-3: Officers develop the capability to lead a full foresight project for a real organisation
CFF-4: Foresight professionals become certified to train others at Level 1
CFF-5: Foresight leaders become certified to train others at advanced Level 2
CLF-1: Leaders develop collaborative leadership powered by the Powers of AND
CIL: Leaders turn innovation into a repeatable competency through the SCD framework
MCI-1: Professionals build a solid grounding in the fundamentals of management consulting
MCI-2: Consultants apply the fundamentals to real-world client projects
MCI-3: Managers learn to bridge strategy and execution with the REALIZE methodology
MCI-4: Leaders develop visionary leadership and advanced strategy execution
